sentence: Love Maldini, glad to see him enjoying life.
We happy again with Paolo guiding us to the future and bringing enthusiasm and stability to the team.
In all honesty it was an amazing team work of absolutely great individuals with Maldini at the helm.
Maldini is as Milan as it gets and I was really enjoying watching him build us back up after already being the most loyal and reliable player we have ever had.
Maldini worked wonders and did his best.
